title: The Subsonic Shadow Listening

features.name: listening chamber
features.desc-on-touch: A space where the archive's photoreceptors have failed but perception continues in deeper registers. You listen here and the pressure waves remake themselves as colours you've never seen—ultraviolet songs, infrared whispers.

features.name: pressure pool
features.desc-on-touch: A pool of light that was never visible—stored as sound waves, as pressure gradients, as the skin-sensation of colour. The archive has learned to pool things that cannot be poured.

features.name: ultraviolet reading
features.desc-on-touch: A glyph that says things that have no names. The archive reads it as a medical chart from a surgery conducted in light-wavelengths human eyes cannot process—careful corrections, careful revisions, each suture marked in invisible ink.

features.name: sensory arch
features.desc-on-touch: A doorway that opens only to forms of perception the archive's designers did not anticipate. You move through it and sense becomes shape, pressure becomes meaning, the unseen becomes manifest.

inscription: ERROR: archive's eyes stop working—colour continues; pressure continues; meaning continues without the light that justified it

file.name: Ultraviolet_Perception_Log_Corrupted.txt
file.note: A medical chart translated into wavelengths. It documents a surgery conducted beyond the visible spectrum. Entries describe incisions in light, sutures in frequency, the careful correction of somethin

exits.label: back toward the ultraviolet shelf where colour still means something
deeper still, toward the place where sound becomes silence becomes pressure
toward the understory's thickening, where roots listen for water
